opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB profile.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors with online scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture leads when Meridian's phones are closed.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Meridian leaves seasonal tune-up revenue on the table with no automated customer outreach.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season HVAC maintenance reminders via SMS and email to past Boise customers.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 73 Google reviews at 4.4 stars with zero detected owner responses to any reviews.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal neglect to prospective Boise customers comparing local HVAC providers.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to auto-generate personalized, branded responses to every new Meridian Google review.
